title: 4. Capturing agent hooks and execution events

blocks.content: SDK events and lifecycle hooks allow auditing, metrics logging, or custom security checks before executing model decisions or tool runs.
Subscribing to Runtime Events in NodeJS

blocks.title: Blocking Hooks
blocks.content: Ensure listener methods resolve quickly. Long-running synchronous handlers will block the agent's reasoning cycle, inducing high latencies.

Question 1: Which hook is ideal for validating if a tool has permission to run?
- A) model:request
- B) tool:start
- C) execution:complete

Feedback: Option B is correct. tool:start triggers before the actual tool code executes.
